title: Foundation
description: Initial release establishing the core 8-section framework. Covers premise, layers, roles, rituals, artifacts, delivery cycle, communication patterns, and operating principles.
highlights: 8-section governance framework
4-layer model: Strategic, Product, Execution, Dependencies
10 operating axioms
Mermaid flow diagrams
Hello World cycle walkthrough
Escape Hatch / Intent Correction pattern

title: Human Craft Layer
description: Redefines how developers and QA practitioners contribute in an agent-driven team. Introduces two new human roles that evolve — rather than replace — traditional craft.
highlights: Craft Engineer role: governs how agents write code
Quality Advocate role: defines what good looks like
Craft Review ritual: human judgment pre-flag
Axiom A11: Agents amplify human craft, not replace it

title: Consistency & Governance
description: Fixes naming inconsistencies, closes governance gaps in memory and gate authority, adds Escape Hatch pattern, and clarifies human decision boundaries throughout.
highlights: Fixed Planner/Orchestrator naming inconsistency across all sections
Added Escape Hatch (intent correction) pattern to delivery cycle
Added A12: Agents write memory, humans govern it
Clarified Quality Advocate authority vs PO final gate call
Added PO backup/delegate guidance to prevent indefinite gate holds
Craft Review now visible in delivery cycle diagram
Drift check cadence aligned between Section 02 and Section 04

title: Cycle Flow Visual
description: Restores the Mermaid cycle flow diagram from v1, updated to include Craft Review, Intent Correction, and production fail paths introduced in v2/v3.
highlights: Mermaid cycle flow diagram restored and updated for v4 role model
Craft Review step added to cycle flow (Craft Eng + QA before PO gate)
Intent Correction and production fail paths shown in visual flow
Last remaining 'Planner' reference fixed in Section 07 comm-card
